states.name: Draft
states.description: Objective being authored; no execution authority.

states.name: Approved
states.description: Governance approved; not yet ready for execution.

states.name: Active
states.description: Execution authorized; work may be assigned.

states.name: At Risk
states.description: Material risk to achieving desired state.

states.name: Completed
states.description: Desired state achieved per governed closeout.

states.name: Superseded
states.description: Replaced by a successor Objective with lineage.

parent_initiative_gate: Objectives may not become active until parent Initiative is active.
